intro: Simocheilus fourcadei, also known as the Cape River Sedge or River Sedge, is a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as sedges. The Cape River Sedge has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
